2026-02-27T12:56:14.2107218Z [36;1m# Copy Copilot session state files to logs folder for artifact collection[0m
2026-02-27T12:56:14.2107856Z [36;1m# This ensures they are in /tmp/gh-aw/ where secret redaction can scan them[0m
2026-02-27T12:56:14.2108330Z [36;1mSESSION_STATE_DIR="$HOME/.copilot/session-state"[0m
2026-02-27T12:56:14.2108693Z [36;1mLOGS_DIR="/tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/agent/logs"[0m
2026-02-27T12:56:14.2109010Z [36;1m[0m
2026-02-27T12:56:14.2109218Z [36;1mif [ -d "$SESSION_STATE_DIR" ]; then[0m
2026-02-27T12:56:14.2109653Z [36;1m  echo "Copying Copilot session state files from $SESSION_STATE_DIR to $LOGS_DIR"[0m
2026-02-27T12:56:14.2110086Z [36;1m  mkdir -p "$LOGS_DIR"[0m
2026-02-27T12:56:14.2110633Z [36;1m  cp -v "$SESSION_STATE_DIR"/*.jsonl "$LOGS_DIR/" 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-02-27T12:56:14.2111071Z [36;1m  echo "Session state files copied successfully"[0m
2026-02-27T12:56:14.2111378Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-02-27T12:56:14.2111666Z [36;1m  echo "No session-state directory found at $SESSION_STATE_DIR"[0m
2026-02-27T12:56:14.2112011Z [36;1mfi[0m
